lines.lyrics: There's no need for devastation
And let's give fate the upper hand
Let it spread across the nation
Run its fingers through the sand
While we've always been a wild one
I've turned into the thing I'm not
Take a deeper look at what we've done
You're starting to be just what you sought
A love so deep it sees no end
It breaks right through my dreams and thoughts

lines.chords: C  C/Bb  F  Bb  Dm  Db
lines.lyrics: It must depend on what we've lost

lines.chords: C  C/Bb  F  Bb  Dm  Db
lines.lyrics: But you will find it, right beside it, eye to eye
I'm not hiding from affection
It's just in a different place
And now that there's a loss of connection
It's left it with a different taste
A hole so deep it sees no end
It breaks right through my dreams and thoughts

lines.chords: C  C/Bb  F  Bb  Dm  Db
lines.lyrics: It must depend on what you've lost

lines.chords: C  C/Bb  F  Bb  Dm  Db
lines.lyrics: But you will find it, right beside it, eye to eye
I found my way back to the section
That had me holding on to you
And you'll never lose my attention
It's the least that I will do

lines.chords: B  Abm7  Bbm7  Db  D  C
